entries.note: Log into NASA
Work on lets-encrypt CLI - enable vpc flow logs, somewhere, everywhere ... (SMDC-1313) yes we will turn on Flow Logs as soon as this afternoon!
First, crossplane problems & AI solutions. I can't help myself, I see something broken, it gets in my way; I want to fix it before it can hurt anybody else.
Try to address addon loops in production ucp (smdc-shared-services-efs-claim-confluence-...) same problem in rp-cluster. Fixed.
Back to the flow logs thing
Get LLM stuff cooking on the home side (mecris-bot broke a bunch of stuff, we can fix it, this is good practice for work - you all are gonna want someone who can fix this kind of stuff, aren't you?)
Log onto NASA laptop and see if we can get the StackSet for Flow Logs deployed in sandbox, at least!
Go for a walk while the terraform plan runs in production (CBA)
Run SMDC-1313 deploy in Sandbox (it failed) let's diagnose the StackSet and see if we can understand why. Sandbox things!
It didnt work on the first try. Let's see if it works on the next try... yeah it didn't work on the third or fourth try either, we need Bick's help for this one.

Let's work on SMDC-1094 instead - Design Remediation Tracking and Reporting System - while we idle that task in the background (Speckit is on it) we're going to look at the smdc-ucp cluster to see if we can understand why there are still events firing in a loop, they should have settled down. This was that Addons issue we worked on yesterday.

Addon and Speckit - pause the Addons, let's move on for now. (Reminder to self: Create an alert for paused crossplane resources. Reminder to self: Create alerts for all Crossplane MRs! Failed & Paused statuses. Compositions & XRs too.)
Well, it looks like we are almost finished with SMDC-1094
The scan is running — 12 accounts × 17 regions = 204 API calls. I'll check progress in a moment. Still running — the output may be buffered. I'll wait for the notification when it finishes.
Generate report
Spin app and mecris development <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Log into NASA, check on Jira tasks, prepare for tomorrow
Coffee and wake up, read Kubernetes 1.36 release notes (blog)
Log onto NASA, work on tickets
SMD Update Q&A
Return to conversation about AWS Config task - can we finish the documentation and repeat this process in production today? - Yes!
Run this workflow in production now. Document everything. Close out 007 feature with a merge request into discover-iac-crypto and link it back to SMDC-1094.
Wrap up the day
Log into NASA - figure out what work we're going to do today. Looks like we're working on SMDC-1296 to bring more observability to the STAR cluster
Twice Weekly SCIP Sprint Tag Up
Establish whether CNCF just shut off my GitHub Copilot business (kingdonb) usage - they did!
Talk with Amber about AWS Backups & Persistent Volumes in Kubernetes
Keep going with the monitoring implementation in star-infra-dev
Work on SMDC-1296
Flux Bug Scrub <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Work on deploying the VPC Flow Logs (SC-8 flow logs for VPC-EC)
STAR Tagup
Review flow logs MR (Number 58 on security-account-infrastructure) with Amber before merge
Apply the change in prod.  Document what we found.

Work on the lets-encrypt tool and see what our VPC flow logs assessment looks like - first time running assess-vpc-flow-logs or assess-vpc-encryption from a position where there should be flow logs that conform (and thus can tell us what we need to know about vpc-ec! 🎉)
Walking with Boris <{{|t|12505450|}}>
